D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Atom

Goos-Hänchen Shift

approach the critical angle and watch the totally reflected beam shift sideways along the surface

At total internal reflection the evanescent wave's penetration gives a finite-width beam a small lateral shift D along the surface — measurable to nanometres in optical-fibre couplers.

Slide θ from below the critical angle (θ_c ≈ 41.8°, glass→air) up past it. As θ approaches θ_c from above, the gold surface trail (D) lengthens rapidly.
